cuisine_type: 本帮菜 / 江浙菜 — specialty 蟹宴 (crab banquet)
address: 福州路603号 / 603 Fuzhou Lu, Huangpu
opened_at: 1744 (Qianlong era, founded as 王宝和绍酒栈; current restaurant location long-established)
restaurant_group: 王宝和 (Wang Bao He — Shanghai 中华老字号; also operates 王宝和大酒店 at 九江路555号)
signature_dishes: 清蒸大闸蟹 (steamed hairy crabs — flagship)
蟹粉炒年糕 (crab roe stir-fried rice cakes)
蟹粉狮子头 (crab roe lion's-head meatballs)
蟹粉小笼包 (crab roe soup dumplings)
黄酒 huangjiu (own-brand yellow wine — origin product)
vibe_and_space: Clean, bright dining hall with attentive (older-female) service staff — '店堂倒也整洁明亮，服务员阿姨们也很热情周到'. Traditional 老字号 ambience, no modernization signals. The 王宝和 brand also operates a separate 4.5-star hotel at 九江路555号 — the restaurant venue at 福州路603号 is the food-focused one.
one_paragraph_recommendation: Shanghai's most famous 蟹宴 老字号 — founded 1744 (Qianlong era), specializes in crab from hairy-crab season (九雌十雄 — 9th lunar month for female, 10th for male). Listed on Michelin Plate (厨艺精湛, not starred) and 大众点评 必吃榜 in 2018 and 2020 — but notably NOT on the 2025 必吃榜, suggesting consensus has slipped. The Tripadvisor 3.8 vs Ctrip Dianping 4.6 split is the canonical authority-vs-experience contradiction this iteration was testing: institutional authority (Michelin Plate + 老字号 status + heritage shopping-tourism location on Fuzhou Lu) holds up; granular customer satisfaction is closer to 'competent but no standout'. Recommend ONLY in peak crab season (Oct-Nov) and ONLY if you specifically want the crab banquet experience in a traditional 老字号 setting; outside of crab season the cooking is, per consensus, plateaued. This is the second worked example (after Lao Zheng Xing) of the proposal.md anti-pattern: 'Michelin-listed but service complaints in 公众号 reviews' — record contradictions, do not silently inherit the authority signal.
contradictions: MULTIPLE: (1) Michelin Plate listing + 老字号 heritage status vs Tripadvisor 3.8 (Shanghai #392 of 17,095) — institutional authority and tourist-tier rating signals diverge. (2) Dianping Ctrip 4.6 (good) vs Tripadvisor 3.8 (modest) — Chinese-platform vs Western-platform rating gap, suggesting the place satisfies Chinese family/business diners but underperforms for English-speaking tourists. (3) On 必吃榜 2018 and 2020 but NOT 2025 — crowd consensus has shifted away despite continued institutional authority. The Lao Zheng Xing pattern generalizes: 老字号 Michelin status rewards lineage and signature dishes (crab banquet), not day-to-day kitchen consistency. The Tripadvisor / 必吃榜-2025 dropout are the canonical signals to watch.
